articles.title: Here’s the full lineup of athletes and celebrities involved in Drake Maye’s charity softball game
articles.description:
Maye's first annual charity game is at Polar Park in Worcester on Sunday, featuring a star-studded lineup.

The post Here’s the full lineup of athletes and celebrities involved in Drake Maye’s charity softball game appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Drake Maye's charity softball game takes place at Polar Park in Worcester on Sunday.
The event features a lineup of notable athletes and celebrities supporting local causes.
Proceeds will benefit Boston-area charities, enhancing community support and engagement.

articles.title: Potential A.J. Brown Patriots-Eagles trade reportedly has ‘framework in place’
articles.description:
The reported June 1 green light date is Monday.

The post Potential A.J. Brown Patriots-Eagles trade reportedly has ‘framework in place’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots and Eagles reportedly have trade framework for A.J. Brown in place.
Trade discussions are expected to intensify following the June 1 green light date.
A.J. Brown's addition could significantly enhance the Patriots' offensive capabilities for the upcoming season.
